allowedImportSources: src/content/pathway-lessons/*.json catalogs (merge only; DB wins when row exists)
contentTypes.ownershipPathwayMapping: pathwayId + locale on PathwayLesson; catalog shards keyed by pathwayId
contentTypes.legacyFallbackNotes: Catalog JSON + ContentItem-linked legacy slugs may hydrate until DB row exists; authoring SoT is PathwayLesson (Option B).
contentTypes.generatedFolderNotes: pathway-lessons/generated-indexes/*.json — build artifacts; not authoring SoT. Rebuild on deploy after lesson changes.
contentTypes.notes: See pathway-lesson-loader header comment for read stack.

contentTypes.ownershipPathwayMapping: Deck/card tags + pathwayId metadata on rows where present
contentTypes.legacyFallbackNotes: Subscriber snapshot readers are resilience/cache — not a second authoring corpus.
contentTypes.notes: Public marketing vs /api/flashcards subscriber split; both must read published DB rows.

contentTypes.ownershipPathwayMapping: tier, exam, topic tags, pathway links on ExamQuestion

contentTypes.notes: Authoring is the question bank; CAT adds session/blueprint diagnostics — tighten pool guard tests separately.

contentTypes.ownershipPathwayMapping: pathwayId nullable (shared bank); category/domain fields on row

contentTypes.notes: DB + publish flag is canonical; E2E proof admin→live page still pending.

contentTypes.validationFunction: med-math migration pipeline tests (see test:pathway-lessons includes med-math contract)

contentTypes.notes: Canonical target is pathway_lessons + question bank; full migration not complete.

allowedImportSources: blog-static-posts.ts / .json — build-time corpus when DB absent only

contentTypes.notes: Hidden/generated recovery tracked by blog recovery tests and content:report-hidden-blogs.

contentTypes.ownershipPathwayMapping: New Grad pathwayId in exam-pathway registry — not a separate CMS
contentTypes.legacyFallbackNotes: No parallel New Grad storage; catalog merge feeds PathwayLesson.
contentTypes.generatedFolderNotes: Catalog JSON shards under pathway-lessons/ — merge inputs, DB authoritative when present.

contentTypes.legacyFallbackNotes: Same stack as RN; no second learner app.

contentTypes.canonicalStorageModel: none (computed from progress + PathwayLesson + planner context)

contentTypes.notes: No single CRUD table; treat planner as derived surface until a DB model is explicitly introduced.

contentTypes.canonicalStorageModel: Progress* / UserTopicStats / dashboard aggregates (multiple Prisma models)
allowedImportSources: Runtime progress writes via app APIs
contentTypes.ownershipPathwayMapping: userId + pathway prefixes on progress rows
contentTypes.notes: Authoring is learner activity, not content CMS; admin views are analytics.
